title: Hollow is now in public alpha!
body:
Welcome to Hollow — a fully distributed, end-to-end encrypted communication platform.

**What's included:**
- End-to-end encrypted messaging (Olm + MLS)
- Voice and video calls (WebRTC + SFrame)
- File sharing with erasure-coded vault storage
- Twitch-gated servers
- Built-in auto-updater

This is the first public release. Everything is free, open-source relay, no account needed. Your identity lives on your device — back up your mnemonic phrase!

Feedback and bugs: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/VitalikPro13/hollow-relay/issues)
